name: DatoCMS
description: DatoCMS is a headless CMS with a GraphQL Content Delivery API and a REST Content Management API. Use the CMA REST API to create, read, update, and delete content records, manage content models, upload media assets, and publish/unpublish records. The base URL for the CMA is site-api.datocms.com.

capabilities.name: items_list
capabilities.description: List all content records with filtering by type, text search, field values, sorting, and pagination.

capabilities.name: items_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content record by its ID with optional nested block expansion.

capabilities.name: items_create
capabilities.description: Create a new content record for a given model type with specified field values.

capabilities.name: items_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing content record by its ID. Omitted fields remain unchanged; null clears a field.

capabilities.name: items_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a content record by its ID.

capabilities.name: items_duplicate
capabilities.description: Create a duplicate copy of an existing content record.

capabilities.name: items_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a content record, optionally limited to specific locales.

capabilities.name: items_unpublish
capabilities.description: Unpublish a content record, reverting it to draft status.

capabilities.name: item_types_list
capabilities.description: List all content models (item types) defined in the project with their field definitions.

capabilities.name: uploads_list
capabilities.description: List all uploaded media assets with filtering, search, and pagination.

capabilities.name: uploads_create
capabilities.description: Create a new upload (media asset) in the DatoCMS media library.

capabilities.name: uploads_update
capabilities.description: Update metadata (author, copyright, notes, tags) of an existing upload.

capabilities.name: uploads_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an uploaded media asset by its ID.
